targetId.description: The item this alias resolves to.

scope.description: Visibility layer. personal — visible only in the personal workspace. org — shared across the org workspace. type — defined at the type level, applies to all items of that type.

provisional.description: true when the alias was computed locally at creation time and has not yet been confirmed as globally unique. false once confirmed at merge time.

confirmedAt.description: Timestamp of the merge-time uniqueness check. null while provisional: true.

computedFrom.description: If this alias was generated by a formula, contains { formulaId }. null for manually created aliases.
